postmark.Subject: Re: Refinance — Sarah Chen
postmark.TextBody:
Lender clarification — the actual lender of record is Scotia Mortgage Corporation (subsidiary), even though the payout statement is on Scotiabank letterhead. Use Scotia Mortgage Corporation in the file. Same payout terms; just a naming clean-up.

Jason Mercer
Mercer Mortgage Group
Lic. #M12001505
